name: Vacation Leave
description: Annual vacation leave per RA 11199 and company CBA

name: Sick Leave
documentNote: Medical certificate required for 3 or more consecutive days
description: For illness, injury, medical consultation, or hospitalization

name: Service Incentive Leave
description: Mandated by the Labor Code of the Philippines — convertible to cash if unused

name: Maternity Leave
documentNote: Medical certificate and SSS Maternity Notification Form (MAT-1) required
description: Per RA 11210 — 105 days paid leave; 60 days for miscarriage or emergency termination

name: Paternity Leave
documentNote: Marriage certificate and birth/fetal death certificate required
description: Per RA 8187 — 7 days for married male employees on the first four deliveries

name: Solo Parent Leave
description: Per RA 8972 — additional 7 working days per year for certified solo parents

name: Bereavement Leave
documentNote: Death certificate or funeral notice required upon return
description: For death of immediate family members (spouse, child, parent, sibling)

name: Emergency Leave
documentNote: Post-leave explanation memo required within 3 working days
description: For unforeseen emergency situations requiring immediate personal attention
